overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dense futuristic city at night. The camera follows the character through neon-lit plazas, up a grand red staircase, across busy intersections, and along sidewalks lined with towering digital billboards and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pedestrian plaza with glowing floor accents

agents.ego_description: walking through an open plaza with glowing cyan floor lights, approaching a commercial district

entered.detail: curved tiered steps with bright cyan neon edge lighting
tall cylindrical pillar with illuminated Asian characters and floral patterns
large iconic red neon sign shaped like lips mounted on a building facade
tall futuristic towers with illuminated windows and holographic displays
tropical trees lining the pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide pedestrian plaza illuminated by vibrant cyan neon floor lights. A distinctive yellow decorated pillar stands to the left while the iconic red neon lips sign glows in the distance. Sparse pedestrians walk through the open space surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with neon planters and storefronts

events.description: moves from open plaza onto narrower commercial sidewalk with bench seating

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past illuminated benches and palm trees, approaching a large red staircase

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a white bench with purple neon underlighting

entered.detail: modern white benches with vibrant purple neon strip lighting underneath
large purple neon sign reading EL GUAPO with decorative graphics
wide grand staircase with red illuminated steps leading to an upper level
small orange and teal storefront with PAWNSHOP signage
red metal walkway connecting buildings above the street level

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a commercial sidewalk lined with white benches featuring purple neon underglow. Palm trees line the path as the camera approaches a grand red staircase leading upward. The prominent EL GUAPO neon sign glows purple on the right while a pawnshop kiosk sits to the left.

events.description: begins ascending the wide red staircase to upper street level

agents.ego_description: walking up the illuminated red stairs toward the upper pedestrian bridge level

entered.detail: yellow painted escalator structure adjacent to the red stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the grand red staircase, transitioning from the lower commercial level to an upper street. The overhead pedestrian bridge looms above while a yellow escalator structure becomes visible to the left. The EL GUAPO sign recedes into the background as the climb continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection under elevated highway structures

events.description: exits staircase onto upper street level with busy intersection
crossing the street at marked crosswalk with other pedestrians while vehicles wait

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with a group of pedestrians, following a person with distinctive red hair and white outfit

notable_agents.action: character with red hair and white bodysuit walking ahead, leading the way across the intersection

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines with WALK text
massive illuminated advertising screens covering building facades
large red metal highway or pedestrian structure spanning above the intersection
illuminated pedestrian signals and traffic control lights

segments.scene_description: Exiting the stairs, the scene opens into a massive intersection beneath towering red overhead structures. The camera follows a distinctive character with red hair across a brightly marked crosswalk. Digital billboards illuminate the surroundings while moderate traffic flows through the intersection and pedestrians cross in groups.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with dense digital advertising

events.description: reaches the opposite sidewalk and continues along the commercial street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past continuous digital billboards and storefronts

entered.detail: ground level commercial entrances with illuminated signage
tall modern street lighting with red pedestrian signal boxes

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera proceeds along a sidewalk lined with continuous digital billboards and storefronts. The dense urban canyon of glass and neon continues overhead, with street lamps and traffic signals marking the path. The environment maintains the dense cyberpunk aesthetic with moderate pedestrian activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched futuristic city, transitioning from a wide open plaza to a dense urban intersection and sidewalk. It begins in a pedestrian plaza illuminated by cyan floor lights and a glowing red lips sign, moving past a yellow decorated pillar toward a commercial sidewalk lined with purple-lit benches and palm trees. As the camera approaches a grand red staircase, it ascends from the lower commercial level past a purple EL GUAPO sign and under a looming pedestrian bridge. The scene then opens into a massive intersection beneath towering red structures, following a red-haired character across a brightly marked crosswalk amidst flowing traffic and digital billboards. Finally, the camera proceeds along a sidewalk flanked by continuous storefronts and towering glass skyscrapers, deepening the sense of being within a dense cyberpunk urban canyon.
